memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain architecture.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection in the Brain architecture.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent in the Brain architecture.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later to the Brain architecture.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the Brain architecture.

details: Identified two open questions without treating them as current decisions.
No conflicts or superseded facts detected.
